name: SANTA emtricitabine and FTC/TAF MCI registry
summary: Recruiting phase 1b randomized double-blind placebo-controlled Singapore study testing emtricitabine and FTC/TAF in mild cognitive impairment or Alzheimer dementia, with safety, plasma AD biomarkers, inflammatory markers, cognitive, and ADL endpoints and no posted results.
population: Adults and older adults with mild cognitive impairment or Alzheimer dementia
